annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Neb. Rev. Stat. sec. 45-104 — 12% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Nebraska’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
